name: Randy Bryce
subject: Hey, let's beat Paul Ryan on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Randy Bryce for Congress
body:
**New poll shows Conor Lamb leading 48 percent to 45 percent.
But Paul Ryan is spending millions against him in the final days of this race.**

Help Conor fight back and win on Tuesday:
| **[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MgyIc4lCZBygMPGd69yLaA==/wKAKtU0HHmBrllKzgBvQ3w==?refcode=em18_180309_km-bryce_rb)**
---

Hello,

I'm not the only target Paul Ryan and his Super PAC have got their eye on -- a special election on Tuesday, March 13th has caught their attention, too.

But Conor Lamb, a Marine veteran and federal prosecutor, is putting up a great fight.

Conor's running for the working people that politicians like Paul Ryan have lied to or ignored, just like me. I've been an ironworker for twenty years, and I've seen first hand how my friends and neighbors are working harder than ever and getting less and less in return. Conor is from the Pittsburgh area in southwestern Pennsylvania -- Steel City territory. He gets it.

**[Can I count on you to chip in $5 to Conor in the crucial last days of the campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/MgyIc4lCZBygMPGd69yLaA==/wKAKtU0HHmBrllKzgBvQ3w==?refcode=em18_180311_km-bryce_rb)**

Pennsylvania's 18th is a place where, as Conor says, "people have always gone to work, often at an early age, and often with their hands. It's where our parents and grandparents built the bridges and roads that built this country."

That sounds just like my district in Wisconsin.

Before I launched this campaign, I was working to build a parking garage for the local VA. And, just like here at home, too many people in Conor's district have been left behind by politicians like Paul Ryan who reward special interests at the expense of regular people.

We don't need more people in Congress who do nothing but cut taxes for corporations and millionaires. We need leaders, like Conor, who will stand up to Paul Ryan, who aren't afraid to say the word "union" and who will do everything they can to make sure working people have a voice.

**[I would be proud to serve alongside Conor in Congress, but with just days to go before Election Day, he needs our help to get out the vote -- so chip in $5 now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/MgyIc4lCZBygMPGd69yLaA==/wKAKtU0HHmBrllKzgBvQ3w==?refcode=em18_180311_km-bryce_rb)**

Thank you,

Randy Bryce
@IronStache

**[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/MgyIc4lCZBygMPGd69yLaA==/wKAKtU0HHmBrllKzgBvQ3w==?refcode=em18_180311_km-bryce_rb)**
